languages.text: "Церемония встречи закончена. Полк, разойтись!" {n}После приказа Батошски солдаты будто испаряются. Но десятки настороженных глаз продолжают следить за вами.{/n}
"The welcoming ceremony is over. Regiment, dismissed!" {n}Following Batoshski's command, the soldiers seem to vanish into thin air. Yet dozens of wary eyes continue to track your every move.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Церемония встречи закончена. Полк, разойтись!" {n}После приказа Батошски солдаты будто испаряются. Но десятки настороженных глаз продолжают следить за вами.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "The welcoming ceremony is over. Regiment, dismiss!" {n}Following Batoshski's command, the soldiers seem to vanish into thin air. Yet dozens of wary eyes continue to track your every move.{/n}
"The welcoming ceremony is over. Regiment, dismissed!" {n}Following Batoshski's command, the soldiers seem to vanish into thin air. Yet dozens of wary eyes continue to track your every move.{/n}
{n}Batoshski shrugs wordlessly, not taking his surly eyes off you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}バトシュスキーは言葉もなく首をすくめた。不機嫌な顔はあなたから離れない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski shrugs wordlessly, not taking his surly eyes off you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: バトシュスキーは言葉もなく首をすくめた。不機嫌な顔はあなたから離れない。

languages.text: "Die Willkommenszeremonie ist vorbei. Regiment, wegtreten!" {n}Auf Batoshskis Befehl hin scheinen sich die Soldaten in Luft aufzulösen. Und dennoch verfolgen Dutzende wachsame Augen jede deiner Bewegungen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The welcoming ceremony is over. Regiment, dismissed!" {n}Following Batoshski's command, the soldiers seem to vanish into thin air. Yet dozens of wary eyes continue to track your every move.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Die Willkommenszeremonie ist vorbei. Regiment, wegtreten!" {n}Auf Batoshskis Befehl hin scheinen sich die Soldaten in Luft aufzulösen. Und dennoch verfolgen Dutzende wachsame Augen jede deiner Bewegungen.{/n}

languages.text: « La cérémonie d'accueil est terminée. Rompez, soldats ! » {n}Sur l'ordre de Batoshski, les troupes semblent se volatiliser comme par magie. Pour autant, des dizaines de paires d'yeux continuent à observer vos moindres faits et gestes.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The welcoming ceremony is over. Regiment, dismissed!" {n}Following Batoshski's command, the soldiers seem to vanish into thin air. Yet dozens of wary eyes continue to track your every move.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « La cérémonie d'accueil est terminée. Rompez, soldats ! » {n}Sur l'ordre de Batoshski, les troupes semblent se volatiliser comme par magie. Pour autant, des dizaines de paires d'yeux continuent à observer vos moindres faits et gestes.{/n}

languages.text: «La ceremonia de bienvenida ha terminado. Regimiento, ¡descansen!». {n}A la orden de Batoshski los soldados parecen esfumarse, aunque sigues notando docenas de miradas cautelosas vigilándote.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The welcoming ceremony is over. Regiment, dismissed!" {n}Following Batoshski's command, the soldiers seem to vanish into thin air. Yet dozens of wary eyes continue to track your every move.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «La ceremonia de bienvenida ha terminado. Regimiento, ¡descansen!». {n}A la orden de Batoshski los soldados parecen esfumarse, aunque sigues notando docenas de miradas cautelosas vigilándote.{/n}

languages.text: "Karşılama töreni sona erdi. Alay, dağıl!" {n}Batoshski'nin emrinin ardından askerler, sanki havaya karışıp kayboluyor. Yine de onlarca temkinli göz, her hareketini izlemeye devam ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The welcoming ceremony is over. Regiment, dismissed!" {n}Following Batoshski's command, the soldiers seem to vanish into thin air. Yet dozens of wary eyes continue to track your every move.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Karşılama töreni sona erdi. Alay, dağıl!" {n}Batoshski'nin emrinin ardından askerler, sanki havaya karışıp kayboluyor. Yine de onlarca temkinli göz, her hareketini izlemeye devam ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: “欢迎仪式到此结束。全团，解散！”{n}随着巴托什斯基一声令下，那些士兵仿佛凭空消失了一般。然而你能感觉到，几十双警惕的眼睛仍在注视着你的一举一动。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The welcoming ceremony is over. Regiment, dismissed!" {n}Following Batoshski's command, the soldiers seem to vanish into thin air. Yet dozens of wary eyes continue to track your every move.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “欢迎仪式到此结束。全团，解散！”{n}随着巴托什斯基一声令下，那些士兵仿佛凭空消失了一般。然而你能感觉到，几十双警惕的眼睛仍在注视着你的一举一动。{/n}
